steps.name: create-branch
steps.description: Create task/t0016_literature_survey_dendritic_computation branch from main and worktree.

steps.name: check-deps
steps.description: Verify task has no outstanding dependencies (dependencies: []).

steps.name: init-folders
steps.description: Create mandatory task folder structure for literature-survey task (paper, answer assets).

steps.name: research-papers
steps.description: Review existing project papers for dendritic-computation content already covered.

steps.name: research-internet
steps.description: Search the internet for ~25 new papers on dendritic computation across six themes.

steps.name: research-code
steps.description: Review prior task outputs (papers, answers, libraries) relevant to dendritic modelling.

steps.name: planning
steps.description: Plan paper downloads and the answer asset synthesising dendritic motifs for DSGC.

steps.name: setup-machines
steps.description: Skipped: local-only task, no remote compute needed.

steps.name: implementation
steps.description: Download ~25 paper assets and write one answer asset synthesising dendritic motifs for DSGCs.

steps.name: creative-thinking
steps.description: Skipped: literature-survey task type does not include this optional step.

steps.name: results
steps.description: Write results_summary.md, results_detailed.md, metrics.json, costs.json for the survey.

steps.name: compare-literature
steps.description: Skipped: no quantitative performance metrics produced by this task.

steps.name: suggestions
steps.description: Write suggestions.json with follow-up tasks on dendritic modelling in DSGCs.

steps.name: reporting
steps.description: Run all verificators, capture session transcripts, finalise task.json.
